findings.message: resource `scoped_doc` exposes a nested route through `family_id`, but no explicit index starts with that field
findings.suggestion: Declare an explicit index on `family_id` so nested-route lookup paths stay visible in the `.eon` contract.

findings.message: resource `scoped_doc` uses `user_id` in `delete, read, update` policy filters, but no explicit index starts with that field
findings.suggestion: Declare an explicit index on `user_id` for schema clarity. Generated migrations can infer one, but the `.eon` contract does not show it today.

findings.message: resource `scoped_claim_doc` uses `family_id` in `read` policy filters, but no explicit index starts with that field
findings.suggestion: Declare an explicit index on `family_id` for schema clarity. Generated migrations can infer one, but the `.eon` contract does not show it today.
